title: YouTube Duration Analysis
description: How does the duration of a YouTube video determine general consumer engagement, measured by likes and views? A project involving: exploratory data analysis, Python, linear regression, hypothesis testing.

title: Valorant Champions Tour (VCT) 2024 Analysis
description: To what extent do headshot rates and agent pick rates predict team win rates across regions in the 2024 VCT playoffs, and does the strength of these predictors vary significantly between regions? A project involving: exploratory data analysis, Python, multilinear regression, PCA, hypothesis testing.

title: Mapping Campus Safety
description: UCSD police logs are publicly accessible online, but how do we make sense of it? Are there certain spots on campus that carry higher theft risk? A project involving: data extraction, exploratory data analysis, Python, hypothesis testing, permutation testing.

title: Carbon in America: Where do we stand?
description: How has climate in America changed based on its membership status of the Paris Climate Agreement? A interactive project involving: geospatial visualization, storytelling with data, JavaScript, D3, HTML, CSS.

title: Steam Game Recommendation Predictor
description: Can we predict whether a user will recommend a game on Steam based on their review and playtime information? A project involving: exploratory data analysis, Python, prediction, classification.

title: Bikewatching
description: How active are bike routes in Boston and Cambridge? A project involving: geospatial visualization, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Mapbox.

title: Recipe Length Analysis
description: Does overall cooking time influence a user's rating on a recipe? What about the number of steps in a recipe? A project involving: exploratory data analysis, hypothesis testing, permutation testing, linear regression.

title: Mental Health Clustering Analysis
description: How do you detect mental health patterns in the workplace? It's not easy, but it's always important to be aware of behavioral symptoms and know when to reach out for help. A project involving: exploratory data analysis, Python, clustering.

title: WildRydes
description: Have you ever wondered how Uber started? Well, it might work similarly to this. A project involving: Amazon S3, Amazon Cognito, Amazon API Gateway, AWS Lambda, Amazon DynamoDB, Amazon CloudFront.

title: Firestart
description: Is there a way to reduce methane gasses from releasing into the atmosphere? By using our Android app, you'll be one step closer to making the planet a better place. A project involving: computer vision, Twilio, Roboflow, Expo, React Native.

title: Heart Attack Data Analysis
description: What are the chances that someone experiences a heart attack based on their symptoms? A project involving: exploratory data analysis, Python, classification (KNN, SVM, Random Forests, Gradient Boosting).
